items.title: Strengthened prompts still generate valid SEO (no regression)
items.precondition: loadPrompt reads the .md prompts as text at generation time
steps: 3. Run the SEO generation + enrichment vitest suites (real loadPrompt, mocked LLM)
items.expected: Type-check clean; generation/enrichment tests pass with the edited prompts
items.evidence: tsc exit 0; service.seo-generation.test.ts + seo-enrichment.test.ts = 29/29 pass (loadPrompt reads the edited .md files for real). Prompt additions reinforce already-shipped code guardrails and contradict none.

items.title: Lessons doc authored and inert (documentation only)
items.expected: Comprehensive reference exists next to the prompts; not loaded into any LLM prompt
items.evidence: SeoGeneration.LESSONS.md created with all rules grouped, each tied to its motivating failure and enforcing layer, plus an enforcement-index table. Not referenced by loadPrompt (grep confirms), so it ships as documentation only — no prompt-token cost.
items.notes: Internal documentation/prompt change — no browser-observable surface.
